zones.name: Downtown / Franklin
zones.desc: Downtown core, walk to Franklin St & campus; newer per-bed luxury high-rises.

zones.name: Northside / Rosemary
zones.desc: Historic student-rental grid just N of Franklin; houses + new Rosemary St lofts, walkable.

zones.name: Cameron-McCauley / Pine Knolls
zones.desc: Historic neighborhoods SW of campus; house & condo rentals, walk/bike.

zones.name: MLK Blvd / Estes Corridor
zones.desc: North corridor up MLK Jr Blvd; mid-tier complexes & condos on free bus lines.

zones.name: Carrboro
zones.desc: West of campus, artsy & walkable downtown; older affordable complexes, bike/bus.

zones.name: Meadowmont / NC-54 / Eastgate
zones.desc: East along NC-54 & US-15-501; newer luxury + grad-friendly, greenways & busway.

zones.name: Southern Village
zones.desc: Planned suburban village ~2-3 mi south off US-15-501; townhomes & apts, park-and-ride.

zones.name: Outer I-40 / Park-and-Ride
zones.desc: Car-dependent outer ring (Chapel Watch N near I-40, Governors Club S); cheaper, drive/shuttle.

complexes.name: Shortbread Lofts
complexes.note: 333 W Rosemary; 2-4BR per-bed luxury, in-unit full W/D, rooftop, walk to campus; beds ~$1,100-1,600.

complexes.name: The Warehouse
complexes.note: 316 W Rosemary; 2-4BR furnished per-bed, in-unit W/D, industrial high-rise, 0.4mi to UNC.

complexes.name: Carolina Square
complexes.note: 123 W Franklin; studio-4BR conventional + retail, in-unit W/D, saltwater pool; pricey, on Franklin.

complexes.name: Courtyard Lofts
complexes.note: 431 W Franklin (the 'West Franklin lofts'); lofts w/ in-unit W/D, walk to campus.

complexes.name: Greenbridge
complexes.note: 601 W Rosemary; LEED-Gold condo towers btwn CH & Carrboro, in-unit W/D; mostly owner / pricey rentals.

complexes.name: Lark Chapel Hill (fka Bicycle / Lux)
complexes.note: 602 MLK Jr Blvd; 1-4BR furnished per-bed student, in-unit W/D, grad-popular, on bus line.

complexes.name: University Apartments
complexes.note: 600 MLK Jr Blvd; ~0.65mi to campus, in-unit W/D, utilities incl, on bus; 1BR ~$899 2BR ~$999 (older guide).

complexes.name: TownHouse Apartments
complexes.note: 425 Hillsborough St; 1.5mi, onsite laundry, on bus, cable/internet incl; cheap student staple.

complexes.name: Mill Creek
complexes.note: 700 Airport Rd/MLK; townhouse + garden condos, NS bus 5min to campus, pool/tennis; classic ~$750+.

complexes.name: Timber Hollow
complexes.note: 101 Timber Hollow Ct; 2.8mi, in-unit W/D provided, on bus; 547-1060sqft from ~$1,051.

complexes.name: Chapel Ridge
complexes.note: 101 Legacy Terrace; 1-4BR, in-unit W/D, pool, on bus, water/cable/internet incl; student-oriented.

complexes.name: Chapel View
complexes.note: 2701 Homestead Rd; in-unit W/D, on bus, utils incl; 1BR ~$1,608, 2BR ~$1,178-1,228 (guide).

complexes.name: Berkshire Chapel Hill
complexes.note: 201 S Elliott Rd (Eastgate); 1-2BR, in-unit W/D, shuttle to campus; ~$1,728+; grad/professional.

complexes.name: Sunstone Apartments
complexes.note: 208 Conner Dr (Blue Hill / University Place, next to Berkshire); 1-2BR, in-unit W/D, newer build, near Eastgate & bus lines.

complexes.name: Notting Hill
complexes.note: 100 Drew Hill Ln (Erwin/Eastowne); 1-3BR, on bus, ~5mi/11min to UNC; from ~$1,233.

complexes.name: The Reserve at Meadowmont
complexes.note: 100 Village Crossing Dr; 1-3BR luxury, in-unit W/D, greenway/busway; 1BR avg ~$1,457.

complexes.name: Glen Lennox
complexes.note: 5 Hamilton Rd (NC-54/US-15-501); mid-century garden apts, onsite laundry, on bus, 2.1mi; redeveloping.

complexes.name: Southern Village Apartments
complexes.note: 200 Copperline Dr; apts/condos/townhomes around Market St, on bus + park-and-ride; 1BR ~$950-1,065.

complexes.name: Estes Park
complexes.note: 306 Estes Dr Ext; student discount up to 10%, in-unit W/D provided, on bus, quick bike to UNC.

complexes.name: Autumn Woods
complexes.note: 222 Old Fayetteville Rd; 1-3BR, on all 3 bus lines, in-unit W/D; affordable Carrboro staple.

complexes.name: Bridges at Chapel Hill
complexes.note: 142 BPW Club Rd; in-unit W/D provided, on bus; ~2.3mi; 1BR ~$780-899 (older guide).

complexes.name: Royal Park
complexes.note: 501 NC-54 Bypass; W/D for rent (not in-unit standard), on bus, student discount; very cheap.

complexes.name: Villages of Chapel Hill
complexes.note: 1000 Smith Level Rd; onsite laundry, on bus, ~2.3mi; budget student/grad option.

complexes.name: The Lookout
complexes.note: 215 Purefoy Rd; 4BR/4BA student duplex-townhomes, in-unit W/D, granite/SS; near campus south.

complexes.name: Townhomes at Chapel Watch Village
complexes.note: 100 Ginkgo Trl; 2-3BR luxury townhomes, in-unit W/D, across from UNC park-and-ride; ~$2,122-2,984.

complexes.name: Camden Governors Village
complexes.note: 100 Durant St, Governors Club (~5mi S off US-15-501); 1-3BR apts/townhomes, in-unit W/D; car-dependent.
